meta.title: ClinixSummary – The AI Medical Scribe Foundation
meta.description: ClinixSummary is the foundational AI architecture for clinical documentation, billing, and specialized medical assistance.

dropdown.by_specialty_desc: 40 + medical & allied health specialties & assist modules
dropdown.integrations_desc: Flexible exports into EHR & EMR systems.

hero.kicker: AI medical scribe for modern clinicians
hero.title: Voice in. Meticulous notes out.
hero.description: ClinixSummary turns every consultation into structured, billing‑ready documentation – in seconds – so you can reclaim your time for patients, not paperwork.
hero.try_desc: No sign-up required. Open the console and experience ClinixSummary with a free trial – start documenting in seconds.

core.title: Built on Kaizen & Contextual Reasoning.
core.description: Inspired by Kaizen (“change for the better”), ClinixSummary is continuously refined through careful clinical review and quality assurance. During each session, our modules use contextual reasoning to generate structured notes that fit the specialty and the encounter.
core.llm_desc: Fine-tuned on vast amounts of de-identified clinical data to ensure surgical precision and terminology accuracy across all medical specialties and complex clinical narratives.
core.efficiency_desc: Our lean, high-performance architecture eliminates the need for expensive human scribe teams, delivering industry-leading accuracy at a fraction of the traditional operational cost.

capabilities.title: The gold standard for clinical documentation.
capabilities.description: ClinixSummary sets the gold standard for clinical documentation. From primary care to orthopaedics, dermatology, paediatrics and beyond – we capture the nuance of real‑world medicine while standardising the structure for continuity of care, coding, and billing.
capabilities.transcription_desc: High‑accuracy recognition of medical terminology, acronyms and abbreviations – even with accents and real‑world background noise.
capabilities.notes_desc: Outputs ready‑to‑paste or push: notes, referral letters and patient instructions in seconds.
capabilities.coding_desc: Generate codes that support cleaner claims, fewer queries and better analytics.
capabilities.ambient_desc: Record consultations ambiently or via quick dictation – whichever suits your consultation best.
capabilities.reasoning_desc: Our advanced modules infer context and generate clinically useful, billable documentation at the point of care including differential diagnosis.
capabilities.legal_desc: Accurate & meticulous documentation reduces malpractice risk and improves reimbursement accuracy.

outcomes.title: Instant quantifiable impact
outcomes.description: ClinixSummary delivers gold-standard documentation that improves the patient encounter, slashes documentation time and boosts reimbursement accuracy.
outcomes.satisfaction_desc: In a study of 7,260 physicians across 2.5 million encounters, 47% of patients said their doctor spent less time looking at the computer, and 84% of physicians reported a positive effect on patient communication.<sup style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent);cursor:help" title="Tierney AA et al. (2024, 2025). NEJM Catalyst Innovations in Care Delivery. doi:10.1056/CAT.23.0404; doi:10.1056/CAT.25.0040">[1]</sup>
outcomes.cognitive_desc: In a multi-site study, clinician burnout decreased from 51.9% to 38.8% after 30 days of AI scribe use (adjusted OR 0.26, P<.001).<sup style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent);cursor:help" title="Olson KD et al. (2025). Use of Ambient AI Scribes. JAMA Netw Open. 8(10):e2534976. doi:10.1001/jamanetworkopen.2025.34976">[2]</sup> With technology fading into the background, care comes to the foreground.
outcomes.revenue_desc: Accurate notes mean fewer coding errors, fewer denials, faster submission, and stronger reimbursement.

calculator.title: Calculate your annual ROI.
calculator.description: See exactly how much time and money ClinixSummary saves you based on your practice’s metrics.
calculator.billing_note: Billing in USD. Flexible annual contracts available for clinics, groups and hospitals.

calculator.money_saved_desc: Reclaim this value by focusing on revenue-generating tasks.
calculator.patient_focus_desc: Clinicians report significantly higher patient engagement scores and satisfaction.
calculator.burnout_desc: This frees up mental energy, contributing to documented improvement in professional fulfillment.

why.title: What sets us apart.
why.description: Built by clinicians who understand documentation burden firsthand.
why.audio_desc: Your audio is permanently deleted the moment your note is generated. No recordings stored, ever. Privacy by design, not by policy.
why.kaizen_desc: Our Kaizen methodology delivers continuous weekly refinement. Your scribe gets smarter every week — not every quarter.
why.specialties_desc: From cardiology to physiotherapy, speech therapy to veterinary medicine. One platform covers the full breadth of clinical documentation.
why.languages_desc: Full multilingual documentation including RTL Arabic. Handle consultations where patients naturally switch between languages.
why.pricing_desc: Transparent credit-based pricing starting from free. Enterprise plans with custom volumes and dedicated support.

pricing.title: Transparent plans for every practice.
pricing.description: Choose a plan aligned with your encounters and documentation volume. All plans include access to the same core AI engine – you only pay for usage.
pricing.enterprise_question: Looking for Enterprise or Organizational licensing?

clinicians.title: Reclaim Your Practice: Focused Care, Zero Paperwork.
clinicians.description: ClinixSummary is your dedicated partner against administrative fatigue. Designed for the clinician who values patient time above all else, our AI scribe allows you to focus 100% on the consultation while ensuring your documentation, coding, and billing are immaculate.
clinicians.relationship_desc: Stop the documentation drain and restore true eye contact and engagement with your patients. With ambient AI, the computer fades into the background, and the therapeutic relationship comes to the foreground.
clinicians.relationship_b1: Zero screen time during the encounter.
clinicians.relationship_b2: Reclaim 2+ hours per day for yourself or for clinical work.
clinicians.relationship_b3: Reduce risk of burnout and enhance work-life balance.
clinicians.revenue_desc: For solo practice, every dollar counts. Our AI is tuned to automatically suggest the most accurate and highest-fidelity ICD-10 and CPT codes based on the clinical narrative, reducing under-coding and claim denials.
clinicians.revenue_b3: Audit-ready notes prepared for any review.
clinicians.adaptive_desc: Learns and applies your preferred SOAP, narrative, or specialized template.
clinicians.hipaa_desc: Secure, compliant, and ready to meet all global privacy standards.
clinicians.ehr_desc: Direct copy/paste integration into all major (and custom) EHR systems.
clinicians.support_desc: Quick support via email and chat for rapid resolution.
clinicians.cta_title: Start Saving Time and Reclaiming Your Clinical Focus Today.

orgs.title: Unlock productivity & satisfaction across your practice.
orgs.description: ClinixSummary delivers measurable outcomes for clinics, groups and health systems. Our fine‑tuned AI saves hours per clinician, boosts patient satisfaction and reduces denied claims – all while integrating seamlessly into your existing workflows.
orgs.tech_title: Technology: Ambient, dictation & inference in one platform
orgs.tech_desc: ClinixSummary combines ambient capture, quick dictation and advanced inference to fit every workflow. Our AI infers clinical meaning from natural conversations – deducing context without fabricating facts. Whether you need to document visits in real time or summarise notes afterwards, it adapts to you.
orgs.ambient_b: Ambient capture: Hands‑free documentation without interrupting the patient encounter.
orgs.dictation_b: Rapid dictation: Narrate your assessment and plan; our models will structure and code it.
orgs.inference_b: Inference engine: Models infer context from captured facts and clinician feedback – never fabricating information.
orgs.results_title: Proven results: Quantified impact at scale
orgs.results_desc: Research and real-world deployments show that ambient AI scribes dramatically improve operations for healthcare organisations.
orgs.satisfaction_b: Higher satisfaction scores (Positive effect on patient interactions).
orgs.why_desc: ClinixSummary isn’t just a transcription tool – it’s an enterprise platform built to meet the needs of multi‑site clinics, hospital networks and payer organisations.
orgs.multi_desc: Supports medical, dental, allied & veterinary teams.
orgs.cta_title: Ready to pilot ClinixSummary in your organisation?
orgs.activity_desc: Captures procedures, services, and clinical activities performed during encounters.
orgs.mapping_desc: Maps to your organisation's specific CPT code library for accurate billing.
orgs.claims_desc: Eliminates missed charges and reduces time to claim submission.
orgs.team_desc: Multi-clinician deployment with team dashboards and usage analytics.

insurers.title: Drive Utilization Efficiency and Reduce Claims Complexity.
insurers.description: ClinixSummary offers a powerful partnership to major payers. By ensuring provider documentation is standardized, verifiable, and precise at the source, we reduce manual review, minimize disputes, and accelerate the transition to value-based care models.
insurers.doc_desc: Our AI platform is designed to ensure every record adheres to the highest level of clinical and regulatory rigor (ICD-10/CPT guidelines, medical necessity). This meticulousness directly translates into reduced ambiguity during claims processing.
insurers.doc_b1: 99% reduction in manual data entry errors.
insurers.doc_b2: Built-in compliance engine for regulatory adherence.
insurers.doc_b3: Enhanced audit trails for payor integrity programs.
insurers.util_desc: We streamline the information flow needed for Utilization Review and claims adjudication. Clear, structured SOAP notes allow for automated checks against medical policy criteria, cutting turnaround times and reducing administrative overhead.
insurers.util_b2: Better insights into provider practice patterns.
insurers.util_b3: Improved provider network satisfaction due to fewer queries.
insurers.partner_title: Co-development of clinical guidelines and quality metrics.
insurers.partner_desc: Partner with ClinixSummary to co-develop custom AI modules that align directly with your internal medical policies, quality assurance protocols, and emerging value-based care initiatives.
insurers.template_desc: Tailored documentation templates enforced by AI standards.
insurers.security_desc: HIPAA-compliant infrastructure and Business Associate Agreements.
insurers.ehr_desc: Seamless data exchange with your existing payer systems.
insurers.pilot_desc: Dedicated deployment and support for initial regional rollouts.
insurers.cta_title: Ready to Transform Your Claims Processing?

news.title: Latest news & product updates.
news.description: Follow our journey as we expand into new specialties, roll out advanced modules and share major company milestones.
news.oct_desc: Our new Radiology Assist module harnesses specialised AI to generate structured radiology summaries with diagnostic impressions and follow‑up recommendations. Built in partnership with board‑certified radiologists, it streamlines workflow while preserving interpretive nuance.
news.sep_desc: The Dermatology Assist module leverages fine‑tuned models trained on dermatologic terminology to create concise notes and patient instructions. Clinicians can dictate skin findings in natural language and receive structured assessments and plans in seconds.
news.aug_desc: We’re honoured to have been recognised at the Healthcare AI Innovator Awards for our contributions to ambient documentation and clinician wellbeing. The judges highlighted our evidence‑driven approach and commitment to privacy‑first design.
news.jun_desc: ClinixSummary has partnered with GlobalHealth Systems to deploy our AI scribe across their network of 200 hospitals. Together we’re transforming documentation workflows and elevating patient experience worldwide.
news.may_title: Series A funding to accelerate R&D
news.may_desc: We’re excited to announce a successful Series A financing round led by leading healthcare investors. The capital will fuel expansion into new specialties, bolster our compliance framework and scale our customer success team.
news.story_desc: If you’ve used ClinixSummary to transform your practice, we’d love to highlight your success. Get in touch with our marketing team to be featured.
news.q1_2026_title: Language Expansion: Arabic with Full RTL Support
news.q1_2026_desc: ClinixSummary now supports Arabic with complete right-to-left interface and documentation support, joining English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, and Italian. This milestone extends our reach to clinicians across the Middle East and North Africa.
news.q4_2025a_desc: We’re proud to announce the Clinix Foundation — our programme providing free ClinixSummary access to clinics and practices in relief areas and underserved communities. Applications are now open for humanitarian relief clinics, rural health centres, and NGO-operated medical facilities.
news.q4_2025b_desc: The CME/CPD Vault is now live, integrating continuing medical education directly into the documentation workflow. Clinicians can now track learning hours and earn credits from their documented clinical encounters.
news.q3_2025a_desc: ClinixSummary has formally applied for medical device registration in the United Kingdom, demonstrating our commitment to regulatory compliance and clinical safety standards. This marks an important step in our journey toward full regulatory recognition.
news.q3_2025b_desc: New dedicated modules for Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, and Speech & Language Therapy are now available. Each module features discipline-specific documentation patterns, terminology, and assessment frameworks.
news.q2_2025_desc: Ongoing updates to our specialty modules have expanded coverage to 40+ medical specialties with improved accuracy, expanded terminology recognition, and enhanced language support across all modules.
news.q1_2025_desc: ClinixSummary officially launches as a comprehensive AI medical scribe platform, offering ambient and dictation-based clinical documentation across multiple medical specialties with HIPAA and GDPR compliance from day one.

story.title: Putting clinicians & patients first.
story.description: ClinixSummary exists to let healthcare professionals devote their full attention to those who matter most – their patients. We believe that documentation should empower care, not hinder it.
story.journey_title: Our Journey: From a single idea to a platform for all
story.journey_p1: ClinixSummary started as a project by practicing physicians frustrated with the time they spent typing instead of talking. Working nights and weekends, we built an AI scribe that could reliably capture the nuance of clinical conversations. When colleagues in dentistry, psychology and veterinary medicine asked if they could use it, we realised the need extended far beyond doctors.
story.journey_p2: Today, our team spans clinicians, engineers and designers. We serve practices across medicine, dentistry, behavioural health, allied health and veterinary care. Our journey is defined by one constant: Kaizen – the Japanese principle of continuous improvement. We listen to feedback, ship updates weekly and never stop striving to make documentation invisible.
story.different_title: What Makes Us Different: Clinician‑led, technology‑driven
story.different_desc: Unlike generic dictation software, ClinixSummary is built by clinicians for clinicians. Every decision we make is anchored in the realities of practice – from the need to code‑switch between languages, to the pressures of reimbursement, to the importance of seeing your patient, not your screen.
story.bullet1: All clinicians welcome: Doctors, dentists, therapists, midwives, vets – our models are tuned for your specialty.
story.bullet2: Kaizen mindset: We ship improvements continuously, guided by your feedback. Good enough is never enough.
story.bullet3: Global by design: Our platform supports multiple languages, jurisdictional privacy laws and healthcare systems.
story.cta_desc: Whether you’re a clinician, a clinic manager or a healthcare innovator, we invite you to be part of our mission to simplify documentation for all.

lang.title: Six languages. Full RTL support. Real multilingual consultations.
lang.desc: ClinixSummary supports clinical documentation in six languages — including full right-to-left Arabic support. But language support is more than translation. Our models understand how clinicians actually speak: mixing languages, switching mid-sentence, and using terminology from multiple linguistic traditions in a single encounter.
lang.en_desc: Full support across all varieties — American, British, Australian, South African, Indian, and Caribbean English. Medical terminology, colloquialisms, and regional abbreviations are all understood.
lang.fr_desc: Terminologie clinique complète pour le français métropolitain, canadien et ouest-africain. Prise en charge du vocabulaire médical, des conventions de documentation et des particularités linguistiques propres à chaque système de santé francophone.
lang.es_desc: Español latinoamericano y europeo con cobertura completa de terminología médica. Gestiona las variaciones regionales del lenguaje clínico desde Ciudad de México hasta Madrid y Buenos Aires.
lang.pt_desc: Português brasileiro e europeu com terminologia clínica ajustada para os distintos sistemas médicos, requisitos de documentação e convenções de nomenclatura farmacêutica de cada região.
lang.it_desc: Vocabolario clinico italiano completo con supporto per gli standard documentali del SSN (Servizio Sanitario Nazionale) e le convenzioni terminologiche mediche italiane.
lang.ar_desc: دعم كامل للكتابة من اليمين لليسار مع مصطلحات طبية عربية شاملة. يتعامل مع العربية الفصحى الحديثة ولهجة الخليج السريرية، بما في ذلك المصطلحات الطبية المختلطة بين العربية والإنجليزية الشائعة في بيئات الرعاية الصحية الخليجية.
lang.multi_desc: Clinicians around the world switch between languages during a single patient encounter. ClinixSummary handles this naturally — no mode switching, no language selection buttons, no interruptions to the clinical workflow.
lang.dubai_title: Dubai: English, Arabic & French in One Visit
lang.dubai_desc: A physician in Dubai greets a patient in Arabic, discusses the clinical history in English, and switches to French when a family member joins the consultation. ClinixSummary captures the entire encounter seamlessly, producing a unified clinical note without language boundaries.
lang.montreal_desc: A GP in Montreal switches between English and French mid-sentence — a natural pattern in bilingual healthcare settings. Our models recognise the code-switch instantly, maintaining clinical accuracy across both languages without requiring the clinician to pause or select a language mode.
lang.auto_detect_desc: No mode switching needed. ClinixSummary automatically detects language changes within a single session. Speak naturally in any supported language — or mix them freely — and receive a coherent, clinically accurate note.
lang.cta_title: Document in the language you practise in.
lang.cta_desc: Try ClinixSummary in your language — or in all of them at once.

government.title: Clinical Documentation for Government Healthcare Systems.
government.description: ClinixSummary meets the rigorous documentation standards of government healthcare. From VA hospitals and military medicine to public health systems, we deliver compliant, efficient, and standardised clinical documentation at scale.
government.compliance_desc: Federal healthcare systems have unique documentation requirements. ClinixSummary is designed to meet government-grade security, compliance, and accessibility mandates while reducing the administrative burden on public sector clinicians.
government.public_desc: Whether it's a VA hospital, a military medical facility, or a county public health system, ClinixSummary adapts to the workflows and reporting requirements unique to government-funded healthcare delivery.
government.security_desc: Government-grade encryption, role-based access controls, and comprehensive audit trails designed for the most demanding security environments.
government.deploy_desc: Proven infrastructure for deploying across hundreds of clinicians simultaneously with centralised management and monitoring.
government.manager_desc: A dedicated point of contact to ensure successful rollout, training, and ongoing optimisation within your public health system.
government.cta_title: Ready to modernise government healthcare documentation?

nonprofit.title: Empowering Non-profit Healthcare with AI Documentation.
nonprofit.description: Non-profit healthcare organisations face the same documentation challenges as commercial providers — often with fewer resources. ClinixSummary offers special pricing and dedicated support for qualifying non-profit organisations, and free access through the Clinix Foundation for those serving underserved communities.
nonprofit.pricing_desc: We believe every clinician deserves access to tools that reduce documentation burden, regardless of the organisation's funding model. Qualifying non-profit healthcare organisations receive discounted access to ClinixSummary's full suite of features.
nonprofit.community_desc: Support your clinicians with AI documentation tools that free up time for the patients and communities that need it most.
nonprofit.ngo_desc: NGO-operated clinics and hospitals in humanitarian settings can apply for free access through the Clinix Foundation programme.
nonprofit.teaching_desc: Non-profit teaching hospitals and training centres benefit from documentation tools that help trainees learn proper clinical documentation practices.
nonprofit.cta_title: Explore non-profit pricing or apply for Clinix Foundation access.

integrations.description: ClinixSummary integrates directly into your organisation's web-based EHR and EMR systems. Tailored to your specific workflows, our integration layer channels AI-generated documentation seamlessly into your existing clinical infrastructure.
integrations.badge: This feature is available for organisation and enterprise plans only.
integrations.cta_title: Ready to integrate ClinixSummary into your systems?

security.title: Protecting patient privacy by default.
security.qms_title: Clinix QM: Quality at every layer.
security.resources_title: Patient privacy notice for your practice.
security.cta_title: Ready to secure your documentation workflow?
security.desc: Safeguarding patient data is non‑negotiable. ClinixSummary employs industry‑standard encryption, strict access controls and immediate audio deletion to give you confidence that your practice and your patients are protected.
security.encryption_desc: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and encrypted at rest with AES‑256. These bank‑grade standards ensure that voice recordings, transcripts and metadata remain confidential at all times.
security.ephemeral_desc: We never store audio recordings. Once your note is generated, recordings are immediately and permanently deleted. You remain in control of your transcripts, which you can remove at any time.
security.compliance_desc: ClinixSummary meets the requirements of HIPAA, GDPR, PIPEDA/PHIPA, CCPA and other global privacy regulations. We sign Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) and maintain full regulatory alignment.
security.deidentified_desc: Our models are fine‑tuned on anonymised, de-identified, non‑PHI data and run inference on secure infrastructure. We never use your transcripts to train customer‑facing models.
security.qms_desc: The ClinixQM Quality Management Process generates outputs that meet clinical standards through systematic review, feedback loops, and continuous improvement protocols.
security.qa_desc: Dedicated quality assurance team conducts regular manual reviews of model outputs against clinical documentation standards, ensuring accuracy and completeness.
security.rbac_desc: Fine-grained permission systems ensure that only authorised personnel can access patient data, with full audit trails for every action taken in the system.
security.cert_desc: Ongoing certification processes and third-party audits ensure ClinixSummary meets and exceeds healthcare industry security and compliance benchmarks.
security.deletion_desc: Export & permanent erase at any time
security.resources_desc: Print our patient privacy leaflet in any language and display it in your waiting room or consultation area. It explains how AI documentation works, what happens to the recording, and reassures patients about their privacy.
security.leaflet_desc: Available in 6 languages. Designed for clinic walls and waiting rooms.
